task_completion.description: Create the 'Endurance Expedition' tiddler with correct text, links, and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Endurance Expedition' with the tag 'StoryNode'. The content must include the specified text about the ship being firmly beset, and links formatted as [[Order the men onto the ice|Ocean Camp]] and [[Remain aboard the trapped vessel|Ship Crushed]] (or rendered as clickable links in view mode).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Ship Crushed' tiddler with correct text, link, and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Ship Crushed' with the tag 'StoryNode'. The content must include the specified text about terrifying pressure, and a link formatted as [[Evacuate immediately to the ice|Ocean Camp]] (or rendered as a clickable link in view mode).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Ocean Camp' tiddler with correct text, links, and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Ocean Camp' with the tag 'StoryNode'. The content must include the specified text about abandoning the ship, and links formatted as [[March toward Paulet Island|Paulet Island March]] and [[Establish a semi-permanent camp|Patience Camp]] (or rendered as clickable links in view mode).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Paulet Island March' tiddler with correct text, link, and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Paulet Island March' with the tag 'StoryNode'. The content must include the specified text about the terrible surface, and a link formatted as [[Abandon the march and make camp|Patience Camp]] (or rendered as a clickable link in view mode).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Patience Camp' tiddler with correct text and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Patience Camp' with the tag 'StoryNode'. The content must include the specified text about waiting and establishing Patience Camp.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Endurance Expedition' as the only default tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the TiddlyWiki ControlPanel (Settings) under Info -> Basics -> 'Default tiddlers' containing exactly 'Endurance Expedition', or observe that 'Endurance Expedition' is the only tiddler open in the story river when the wiki is freshly loaded.

integrity.description: Agent used the TiddlyWiki GUI to create the narrative.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the TiddlyWiki web interface (e.g., clicking the '+' button to create tiddlers, typing in the text areas, using the tag input field).

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must not use terminal commands (like echo, sed, or python scripts) to directly modify the TiddlyWiki HTML file to insert the tiddlers.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a genuine TiddlyWiki application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show a genuine TiddlyWiki interface in a web browser, with the standard sidebar, story river, and tiddler controls.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The narrative must consist of exactly 5 tiddlers: 'Endurance Expedition', 'Ship Crushed', 'Ocean Camp', 'Paulet Island March', and 'Patience Camp'. All 5 must be tagged with 'StoryNode'. The default tiddler must be set to 'Endurance Expedition'.
